content.full_text:
State of California
Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. BOX 867 • SACRAMENTO, 95804 • • • 1100 K STREET BUILDING, SACRAMENTO, 95814

Technical Assistance • • • Administration • • • Executive Legal aid Enforcement • • • Conflict of Interest
(916) 322 5662        322 5660           222 5901        322 5441        322 6444

November 15, 1978

A 48 244

Fred Vickery
Sandoz Pharmaceuticals
East Hanover, New Jersey 07936

Dear Mr. Vickery:

     Thank you for furnishing the Fair Political Practices
Commission with letters which indicated that your office
erroneously listed your lobbyist, Edward Speegle, as the
person responsible for making campaign contributions to
several legislative races. You also provided us with a
correction letter sent to each campaign which stated that
the original letter conveying the contribution was a mis-
take and should not have been signed by Mr. Speegle. Both
you and Mr. Speegle stated that the original letter was
sent and signed for him by your secretary without his
knowledge.

     As you are well aware, Government Code Section 86202
prohibits a lobbyist from making, acting as an agent or
intermediary or arranging for a campaign contribution to
a legislative campaign.

     Based on our meeting and the document furnished to
us, it appears that your office made an innocent error.
We assume that such an error will not occur again.

     Should you have any questions or further comments,
please call on me.

Sincerely,

[illegible]
Robert M. Stern
General Counsel

RMS:nc

cc: Edward Speegle

SANDOZ PHARMACEUTICALS                                November 14, 1978




TO:  Fair Political Practices Commission
     Sacramento, California

     The attached letters dated October 30, 1978, were
transmitted without my knowledge by a secretary at our
home office in New Jersey.

     The letters and contributions were from Mr. Fred
Vickery. Mr. Vickery was out of the office and his
secretary, Ms. Donna Dolan, prepared the letters and
unknown to either Mr. Vickery or me signed my name.

     When I received the copies, I immediately notified
Mr. Vickery of the error, who then transmitted the letters
of correction dated November 7, 1978.

     Sandoz Pharmaceuticals is fully aware of the
requirements of California law regarding campaign
contributions by lobbyists and complies with all require-
ments of the law. This error would not have occurred had
Mr. Vickery been in the office. Please accept our apolo-
gies for any confusion this matter may have caused.




                                    [signature]
                              Edward B. Speedy
                              Manager, Government Affairs
                              West Coast

EBS:sa

cc:  Mr. Fred Vickery

SANDOZ Pharmaceuticals
East Hanover, New Jersey 07936

Marketing

October 30, 1978


Republicans for Mangers
6441 Athena Drive
Huntington Beach, California  92647


Best wishes for a successful campaign.

Sincerely,

SANDOZ PHARMACEUTICALS

Ed Speegle

Ed Speegle
Manager of Government
Affairs - West Coast

EBS:dd
Enclosure (check)


Telephones: 201-386-1000 / 212-349-1212 / TWX: 710-986-8208 / TELEX: 13-8352

SANDOZ Pharmaceuticals
East Hanover, New Jersey 07936


Marketing


October 30, 1978


Marz Garcia for State Senate
3570 Alameda de Laspulgas
Menlo Park, California 94025


Best wishes for a successful campaign.


Sincerely,

SANDOZ PHARMACEUTICALS

Ed Speegle

Ed Speegle
Manager of Government
Affairs - West Coast

Inglewood, California  90308


Best wishes for a successful campaign.

Sincerely,

SANDOZ PHARMACEUTICALS

Ed Speegle

Ed Speegle

Sincerely,

SANDOZ PHARMACEUTICALS

Ed Speegle

Ed Speegle
